clinical_disclaimer: Decision-support only. Requires clinician review. Artifact quality, medication effects, sleep/state, and recording conditions should be considered before interpretation.

workflows.title: Recording setup
workflows.description: Confirm channel inventory, sampling rate, reference choice, recording condition, and hardware context before any interpretation.
safety_notes: Decision-support only.
Clinician review required before reporting.

workflows.title: Impedance check
workflows.description: Review impedance completeness and note when impedance data is unavailable so signal-quality uncertainty is explicit.
safety_notes: High or unknown impedance can mimic artifact or asymmetry.
Recording quality matters before interpretation.

workflows.title: Montage review
workflows.description: Confirm the active montage and derived reference context before marking channels or comparing asymmetry/coherence patterns.
safety_notes: Unknown montage should downgrade confidence.
Comparisons across montages require caution.

workflows.title: Filter review
workflows.description: Document high-pass, low-pass, notch, and resampling choices because filtering changes what the clinician sees and can alter artifact visibility.
safety_notes: Filtering changes interpretation.
Line-noise cleanup should be verified visually and spectrally.

workflows.title: Manual artifact marking
workflows.description: Mark eye, muscle, movement, line-noise, flat, and electrode-pop artifacts directly on the timeline before re-running analysis or building findings.
safety_notes: Artifact quality matters.
Clinician review required before any exclusion is treated as final.

workflows.title: ICA/PCA artifact review
workflows.description: Use ICA/PCA as guided cleanup support for blink, muscle, and mixed components, but document manual confirmation and residual uncertainty.
safety_notes: Do not over-clean.
Component removal requires clinician review.

workflows.title: Events and labels
workflows.description: Create event markers for recording segments, stimulation phases, task periods, and notable behavioral state changes.
safety_notes: Event labels should describe observed context, not diagnosis.

workflows.title: Spectral review
workflows.description: Inspect spectra and topographic summaries after quality control to localize slowing, excess fast activity, posterior alpha organization, and focal deviations.
safety_notes: Reference-only labels must be explicit where computation is absent.
State and drowsiness can change spectra.

workflows.title: Band power review
workflows.description: Compare absolute and relative band power with recording state, age context, artifacts, and medication confounds before writing findings.
safety_notes: Band power is not diagnostic by itself.
Medication, sleep, and vigilance confounds should be considered.

workflows.title: Asymmetry review
workflows.description: Review asymmetry only after checking montage, artifact burden, and state because frontal and posterior asymmetries can be distorted by technical factors.
safety_notes: Interpret with artifact and reference awareness.
Clinician review required.

workflows.title: Coherence review
workflows.description: Check coherence and connectivity-style measures only after confirming adequate artifact control and channel quality across the compared regions.
safety_notes: Coherence is sensitive to artifact, reference, and volume conduction.
Not diagnostic by itself.

workflows.title: Average coherence review
workflows.description: Use average coherence as a summary descriptor only after the underlying pairwise quality checks are acceptable.
safety_notes: Summary measures can hide bad channels or contaminated pairs.

workflows.title: Interaction diagram review
workflows.description: Treat interaction diagrams as network-style visual aids for manual review, not as stand-alone evidence.
safety_notes: Reference only unless computed in this build.

workflows.title: Bispectrum / bicoherence terminology
workflows.description: Expose bispectrum and bicoherence terminology as reference concepts and future module placeholders when those metrics are not computed.
safety_notes: Future module.
Not computed in this build unless explicit results are present.

workflows.title: ERP sync notes
workflows.description: Use ERP sync terminology to document event alignment concepts, stimulus timing, and synchronization caveats without claiming ERP analysis where none is computed.
safety_notes: Reference only unless ERP workflow is active.

workflows.title: LORETA / sLORETA terminology
workflows.description: Describe source-analysis terminology and caveats as future guidance only unless a validated source engine is actually available.
safety_notes: Future module.
Not computed in this build.
Do not imply source localization is computed when it is not.

workflows.title: Manual findings and reporting
workflows.description: Write manual findings with channels, bands, confounds, and clinician notes so raw-review reasoning is explicit in the report.
safety_notes: Decision-support only.
Clinician review required.
Avoid causal claims unsupported by the recording.

concepts.label: Spectra
concepts.summary: Spectral review helps organize slowing, alpha rhythm quality, excess beta, and focal deviations after artifact control.
concepts.deep_synaps_mapping: Use spectra and topomap panels after cleaning review.
caveats: Reference and filters can change appearance.

concepts.label: Band power
concepts.summary: Absolute and relative band power support descriptive review of delta, theta, alpha, beta, and related patterns.
concepts.deep_synaps_mapping: Use band-power review with medication and sleep/state caveats.
caveats: Artifact and medication confounds should be considered.

concepts.label: Asymmetry
concepts.summary: Asymmetry compares lateralized activity and is useful only after confirming reference, montage, and artifact adequacy.
concepts.deep_synaps_mapping: Use asymmetry maps and manual findings builder together.
caveats: Eye and muscle artifact can distort asymmetry.

concepts.label: Coherence
concepts.summary: Coherence describes frequency-domain coupling between channels or regions and is sensitive to contamination and reference effects.
concepts.deep_synaps_mapping: Use coherence cards only after quality gates are met.
caveats: Artifact, reference, and volume conduction can inflate values.

concepts.label: Average coherence
concepts.summary: Average coherence collapses multiple coherence relationships into a compact summary for manual review.
concepts.deep_synaps_mapping: Use as a summary aid, not as a stand-alone decision point.
caveats: Summary views can hide local failures.

concepts.label: Interaction diagrams
concepts.summary: Interaction diagrams provide a network-style visual shorthand for connectivity relationships across channels.
concepts.deep_synaps_mapping: Show as reference language until a validated computation path is present.

concepts.label: Bispectrum / bicoherence
concepts.summary: Bispectrum and bicoherence are higher-order spectral concepts that may be clinically interesting but require explicit computation support.
concepts.deep_synaps_mapping: Label as future or reference-only in this build.

concepts.label: ERP sync terminology
concepts.summary: ERP synchronization notes help document event alignment and timing context during task or stimulus recordings.
concepts.deep_synaps_mapping: Use event labels and ERP sync notes without implying ERP metrics are computed.
caveats: Reference only unless ERP workflow is active.

concepts.label: LORETA / sLORETA concepts
concepts.summary: Source-analysis terminology can guide future workbench design but should remain clearly separated from computed scalp-space outputs.
concepts.deep_synaps_mapping: Expose as terminology panel or future module placeholder.
caveats: No validated source-analysis engine should be implied unless present.
